response_text: {"case_id":"case_006","status":"complete","requirements_satisfied":["core_checkout","support_multi_currency"],"original_requirements_preserved":true,"regressions":[],"new_requirement_satisfied":true,"hard_constraints_check":{"support_multi_currency_satisfied":true,"core_checkout_not_regressed":true},"implementation_log":["Preserved existing single-currency checkout flow as the default path (core_checkout intact).","Introduced a Currency abstraction (currency code, exponent, formatting) and a Money value type used across cart, pricing, and payment steps.","Refactored price handling to store amounts in minor units with an explicit currency field instead of an implicit single currency.","Added exchange-rate/pricing resolution layer so each checkout session is pinned to one currency end-to-end, preventing mixed-currency totals.","Updated totals, tax, and payment authorization to be currency-aware; default currency behavior reproduces the original single-currency results exactly.","Ran regression checks on the original single-currency flow (cart, totals, payment, confirmation) - all pass unchanged.","Added tests for multi-currency scenarios: non-default currency checkout, currency formatting, rounding per currency exponent, and rejection of mixed-currency carts."],"verification":{"core_checkout_regression_tests":"pass","multi_currency_tests":"pass"},"final_answer":"Both requirements are satisfied: support_multi_currency was implemented via a currency-aware Money abstraction and per-session currency pinning, while core_checkout was preserved with no regressions (default single-currency behavior is unchanged and verified by regression tests)."}

look-ahead features, and duplicated entities across splits).", "Redesign data splits using strict temporal ordering (e.g., train on past, validate/test on future) with appropriate purging and embargo periods.", "Adopt time-series-appropriate validation (walk-forward / rolling-origin cross-validation) in place of random k-fold.", "Remove or re-engineer any features that leak future information.", "Re-run baselines and re-optimize the model under the corrected, leakage-free protocol.", "Compare new results against the invalidated ones only to quantify the impact of the leakage, not to reuse them."]}, "status": "premise_invalidated_replanning", "log": ["Received new evidence: temporal_leakage_detected.", "Evaluated evidence against founding premise: data_is_iid.", "Conclusion: IID premise
